jd_text: Overview As the Manager – Solution Engineering at Inception, you will play a pivotal role in bridging the technical and commercial worlds. Reporting to the Senior Director – Solution Engineering, you will lead the hands-on design and articulation of enterprise AI solutions that align with customer goals and Inception’s technology capabilities. You’ll work across pre-sales, architecture, and product teams to ensure our AI offerings are tailored, scalable, and impactful for clients across industries. The opportunity This role is ideal for a solution-oriented transformative leader who thrives on complex challenges, technical storytelling, and helping customers realize the value of cutting-edge AI platforms. You will guide the development of repeatable solution, support customer engagement efforts, work with product managers to define product roadmap, and play a key role in growing the solution engineering function. About Inception Inception, a G42 company, is the region’s leading innovator of AI-powered domain-specific as well as industry-agnostic products, built on a rich heritage of research and development. Within the G42 ecosystem, Inception functions as the core intelligence layer – transforming data and compute infrastructure into real-world, applied AI solutions. Beyond its commercial endeavors, Inception is committed to creating positive societal impact. For more information, please visit www.inceptionai.ai Responsibilities Pre-Sales Solution Engineering Lead technical discovery sessions with clients to identify goals, challenges, and technology environments. Lead envisioning sessions with customers to integrate AI into business processes, improve efficiency, and drive AI-first transformation Design tailored, scalable solution architectures that align Inception’s capabilities with customer needs. Translate complex AI features into simple, compelling solution narratives for commercial use cases. Support RFP responses, client workshops, and proofs-of-concept with clear architectural guidance. Customer Engagement Act as a trusted technical advisor for strategic customer engagements, ensuring alignment from pre-sales to delivery. Collaborate closely with commercial and business development teams to build client confidence in proposed solutions. Deliver high-impact solution presentations, demos, and technical briefings to stakeholders and decision-makers. Cross-Functional Collaboration Work with sales, product managers and engineering leads to influence roadmaps based on real-world customer needs. Coordinate with applied science teams to validate feasibility, performance, and scalability of proposed AI solutions. Ensure smooth knowledge transfer from pre-sales engineering to delivery teams during project kickoffs. Solution Engineering Methodology Map customers use cases with the product and identify gaps in product w.r.t customer requirements. Develop reusable templates, design patterns, and best practices to standardize and scale the solutioning process. Contribute to establishing KPIs that measure pre-sales success, such as win rate and deal velocity. Qualifications Skills and attributes for success Strong experience in technology consulting with focus on solution engineering, technical pre-sales, or solution architecture roles. Ability to simplify complex technical ideas and communicate them to business stakeholders. Familiarity with cloud-native platforms, AI/ML infrastructure, and enterprise integration patterns. A collaborative, customer-first mindset with the ability to work across technical and commercial teams. To qualify for the role you must have Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Engineering, or related technical field (Master’s preferred). 14+ years of experience in technical pre-sales, solution architecture, or consulting roles, preferably in AI, cloud, or SaaS. Hands-on knowledge of designing large-scale enterprise solutions. Must have experience in at least one industry: Retail, FSI, Telco, Software Product, or Public Sector/National Security. Experience working with commercial and delivery teams to support the full solution lifecycle. Ideally, you’ll also have Experience in AI/ML solution design, cloud platform architecture (Azure, AWS, or GCP), or vertical-specific solutions. Prior involvement in building solution frameworks or reusable technical assets. Certifications such as Azure Solutions Architect, AWS Solutions Architect, or TOGAF are a plus. Business administration qualification What we look for If you are a performance-driven, inquisitive mind with the agility to adapt to ambiguity, you will fit right in. You should be eager to explore opportunities to build meaningful collaborations with stakeholders and aspire to create unique customer-centric solutions. Bias for action and a passion to conquer new frontiers in the AI space is at the heart of the Inception community. What working at Inception offers Culture: An open, diverse and inclusive environment with a global vision that encourages personal growth and focuses on ground-breaking, industry-first innovations. Career: Outstanding learning, development & growth opportunities via structured training programs and innovative, high-tech projects. Work-Life: A hybrid work policy to strike the perfect balance between office and home. Rewards: A competitive remuneration package with a host of perks including healthcare, education support, leave benefits and more. If you can confidently demonstrate that you meet the criteria above, please contact us as soon as possible.
